# Appendix A: Supporting material {#sec-appA}

## What belongs here

Use the appendix for material that supports the thesis without interrupting the main narrative:

- Ethics approval letters.
- Survey instruments or interview guides.
- Additional tables or figures.
- Detailed codebooks or variable definitions.
- Slides or defense material references.

## Template note

If you want a clean thesis PDF, keep the appendix short and move the really bulky material to a repository, internal drive, or supplementary archive when allowed by your supervisor and program.
